narrow.title: Desktop interface
narrow.desc1: Video Describer is designed for windows at least 900px wide.
narrow.desc2: The app processes local files from your disk and is not accessible from mobile devices — the server only listens on localhost.

context.label: Recording context
context.placeholder: motorcycle trip Poland → Slovakia → Hungary → Serbia

analyze_images.label: AI image analysis
analyze_images.sub: Send frames to Claude for description (requires API key)

transcribe.label: Speech transcription
transcribe.sub: Whisper analyzes audio and merges with frames

overwrite.label: Overwrite existing descriptions
overwrite.sub: .txt files that already exist will be replaced

summary.label: Generate folder summary
summary.sub: Saves _summary.txt with one-line descriptions of all processed files

convert_mode.label: Convert existing .txt files
convert_mode.sub: Generate NLE sidecars from existing descriptions — no AI calls, no cost

convert.title: Convert existing descriptions
convert.desc: Generate NLE sidecar files from already-processed .txt files — no AI calls, no API cost.
convert.warn_no_formats: No NLE formats enabled. Go to Settings → NLE Export and enable at least one.

status.fill_form: Fill in the form and click Start

path_info.picker_opening: Choose a file or folder in the macOS window…
path_info.picker_missing_osascript: macOS osascript command was not found.
path_info.picker_failed: Could not open the file picker.

alerts.provide_path: Please provide a folder or file path

tooltip.start_no_path: Select a folder or file first
tooltip.start_no_key: API key required — configure it in Connectors or set the env variable
tooltip.start_no_features: Enable at least one: AI image analysis or speech transcription

guard.leave_warning: Processing in progress. Are you sure you want to leave?

settings.about_sub: by solarssk — bugs, ideas, contributions welcome
settings.about_github_title: GitHub — report a bug or contribute

syscheck.api_key_missing: API key missing — required for AI analysis

settings.version_help: Configuration saved in config.json and prompts/system.md. Changes take effect on the next processing run.
settings.whisper_tiers_label: Auto-fallback order on thermal throttle (heaviest first)
settings.whisper_tiers_help: Comma-separated. If the system overheats, the model is downgraded one tier.
settings.prompt_help: Define how Claude should describe recordings. Edit freely — change tone, format, add your own rules.
settings.prompt_preset_confirm: Replace your current prompt with the {{lang}} preset? Your current edits will be lost.
settings.nle_help: Generate marker sidecar files next to each .txt after processing.
settings.reset_confirm: Restore all config values to factory defaults? (This does not touch the system prompt.)
settings.saved: ✓ Saved. Changes take effect on next 'Start'.

connectors.title: Connectors
connectors.subtitle: API keys for external services. Saved locally in config.json.
connectors.anthropic_desc: Claude · AI description of video & photos
connectors.from_env_hint: API key is configured on this computer. Paste a new key above to replace it.
connectors.from_env_hint_openai: API key is configured on this computer. Paste a new key above to replace it.
connectors.openai_desc: Whisper API · cloud transcription ($0.006/min) · fallback if no local model
connectors.gemini_desc: Alternative AI provider for video descriptions
connectors.from_env_hint_gemini: API key is configured on this computer. Paste a new key above to replace it.
connectors.no_key_warning: ⚠ Anthropic key missing — configure in Connectors

multi_tab.warning: ⚠ Another tab of this app is already open. Only one tab should be used at a time.
